name: jvmlens-monitor
description: Drop the jvmlens agent into a JVM to profile it over days: it appends one compact CPU/memory/wait sample per interval, then `jvmlens trend` reduces the run to a change-over-time digest (per-dimension direction, hot-path shift, lock emergence, a hedged retention indicator). Also covers one-shot analyze, live profile <pid>, and an MCP server.
